HERO_SUBHEADLINE: Crafting unique, bilingual wedding ceremonies in Miami & South Florida.
ABOUT_INTRO: Hello! I'm Juan Camilo Méndez, an experienced Miami wedding officiant dedicated to creating personalized and heartfelt ceremonies. Whether it's a luxury wedding, an intimate elopement, or a vow renewal, I ensure your 'I do' moment is as meaningful as your love story. I specialize in seamless bilingual (English & Spanish) ceremonies across Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach Counties.
PACKAGES_SUBTITLE: Tailored to celebrate every unique journey.
PACKAGE_INTIMATE_DESC: Perfect for smaller gatherings or elopements.
PACKAGE_INTIMATE_FEATURE_3: One Symbolic Ritual (Sand, Light, or Tree)
PACKAGE_SIGNATURE_DESC: Our most popular choice for a comprehensive experience.
PACKAGE_PREMIUM_DESC: The ultimate package for a deeply immersive and spiritual union.
TESTIMONIALS_SUBTITLE: Heartfelt words from those we've celebrated with.
TESTIMONIAL_1_QUOTE: We wanted a ceremony that felt personal and not like a script. He captured our story perfectly and kept our guests engaged the whole time. If you are getting married in Miami, look no further!
TESTIMONIAL_2_QUOTE: As a bride from out of state, I was worried about the legal requirements in Florida. He walked us through the marriage license process and delivered a stunning bilingual ceremony that our families loved.
TESTIMONIAL_3_QUOTE: Professional, punctual, and incredibly well-spoken. He worked seamlessly with our wedding planner and made the most important part of our day feel truly sacred.
